name: tally-bridge
description: Tally Bridge — end-to-end encrypted financial dashboard for TallyPrime / Tally.ERP 9

scripts.build: npm run build -w @tally-bridge/core && npm run build -w @tally-bridge/crypto && npm run build -w @tally-bridge/protocol -w @tally-bridge/tally -w @tally-bridge/viewmodel && npm run build -w @tally-bridge/sync
